---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new river section, alias, or feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What would you like to see?

_Describe the feature or river section you want added._

## If this is a new river section, please fill in these details

These are the fields needed to add a river — the more you fill in, the faster
we can add it. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for field explanations.

- **River name:** _e.g., Saco River_
- **Section:** _e.g., Upper Conway to Bartlett_
- **USGS Site ID:** _8-digit gauge number, e.g., 01064500_
  _(Find it at https://dashboard.waterdata.usgs.gov)_
- **Run minimum (ft):** _e.g., 2.5_
- **Run maximum (ft):** _e.g., 5.0_
- **Put-in coordinates:** _lat, lon in decimal degrees (e.g., 44.0632, -71.1270)_
- **American Whitewater URL:** _https://www.americanwhitewater.org/..._
- **Correlation gauge?** _Yes/No — does this section use a gauge from a different river?_
- **Dam controlled?** _Yes/No_
- **Notes:** _Any quirks about the gauge or section paddlers should know_

## Why would this be useful?

_Who benefits and how often?_

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can contribute this myself (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] No, I'm requesting this from the maintainers
